name: Booking Holdings
analysis: BKNG has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 26% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry $171.7800, stop $156.5388, target $193.4337 (1.42:1) — then trail it.
